purpose: Master index of all app screens, workflows, click actions, state transitions, and API touchpoints.
principles: Work Mode creates an editable external Work Plan, not hidden model reasoning.
Final answer generation is blocked until a Work Plan is approved.
Editing after approval resets the plan to draft and makes any previous answer stale.
All Work Mode backend calls go through /api/work-mode/*.
HTTP JSON is the current MVP transport; WebSocket and SSE are future upgrades only.

notes: A cancelled generation sets generationStatus to cancelled and returns the main WorkModeUiState to approved.
Autosave failures are represented by autosaveStatus=failed while the main screen remains editing_work_plan.
There is no standalone creating_work_plan or saving_plan main UI state in the current React implementation.

screenFiles.description: Main Claude-like workspace shell, sidebar, mode selector, and composer.
Initial Work Mode prompt entry state. Enter submits; Shift+Enter inserts a newline.
Detected role, artifact, workflow, skill, confidence, alternatives, and overrides.
Skill selector, module checklist, source mode, and create Work Plan action.
Editable Work Plan roadmap editor with 550ms autosave.
Approve/generate state controls and approval reset behavior.
HTTP answer generation loading, cancel, retry, and validation handoff.
Final answer and validation result screen.
Error states, recovery actions, stale versions, API failures, and fallback paths.
Source mode, feature flags, demo token, and backend connectivity UI.
Mobile layouts and interaction behavior for the same flows.
Types, API contracts, event names, and shared action definitions.
